summary_en: Durable and stackable shoe organizers provide an efficient, space-saving solution to declutter chaotic closets, and top-rated options are currently available at discounted prices.

title_en: Five Key Disadvantages of Using a Backhoe Loader on Construction Sites
summary_en: While backhoe loaders offer versatility, their large size, operational limitations, high fuel consumption, transport challenges, and risk of site damage make them inefficient for certain construction projects.

title_en: Most People Do Not Want More AI Integration in Their Daily Lives
summary_en: Despite tech companies aggressively pushing new artificial intelligence features, most consumers prefer thoughtful, practical design over unnecessary and intrusive AI integration in their daily tools.

title_en: Russian Hacker Unveils Commercial Offensive AI Tool Built on Jailbroken Claude
summary_en: A Russian-speaking threat actor named Trim developed a commercial offensive hacking tool by jailbreaking Anthropic's Claude AI model to automate vulnerability exploitation and cyberattacks.
